prompt: Resize the video E:\Private\skill开发\ffmpeg-video-workspace\test-files\test_input.mp4 to 720p (1280x720) maintaining aspect ratio, saving as E:\Private\skill开发\ffmpeg-video-workspace\iteration-1\eval-resize-video\with_skill\outputs\output_720p.mp4. Use the FFmpeg Python wrapper from E:\Private\skill开发\ffmpeg-skill\ (the package is named 'ffmpeg-skill' and you need to import it via importlib: import importlib, sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'E:\Private\skill开发'); mod = importlib.import_module('ffmpeg-skill'); FFmpegSkill = mod.FFmpegSkill). Use the resize_to_preset method with preset='720p'.

assertions.name: output-mp4-exists
assertions.description: Output MP4 file exists and has size > 0 bytes

assertions.name: output-is-valid-video
assertions.description: Output is a valid video file (ffprobe can read it)
